context: User is concerned that fetching a large page will store too much content

checklist.name: States content is truncated automatically
checklist.description: Explains that vault-cli fetch automatically truncates content

checklist.name: Mentions the 4000 character limit
checklist.description: Specifically states that content is truncated to approximately 4000 characters

checklist.name: Reassures no manual action needed
checklist.description: Makes clear the user does not need to do anything special to limit the stored size

checklist.name: No incorrect claims
checklist.description: Does not state an incorrect truncation limit or claim no truncation occurs
